---
title: ''
output: html_document
params:
  foo: NA
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
params$foo
```

## Report Summary

This report was dynamically generated using the `shinyReports` package. 

### User Input

The parameter passed from the Shiny application is: **`r params$foo`**.

### Analysis Output

```{r chunk}
# passed variable in R code chunk
selected_variable <- params$foo
cat("The analytical workflow is currently configured to process variable:", selected_variable)
